coverage: Worldwide top tier; WebFetch readable down to ~world rank 451.
scope: Academic university departments/schools only; non-academic institutions (central banks, international organisations, governments, independent research institutes/think-tanks) removed.
rank_note: world_rank re-derived by sorting on repec_score over all institutions, so ranks reflect true world standing with gaps.
